description: Business letter in Judaeo-Arabic. Dating: ca. 18th century, probably. Mentions: Moshe; a Cypriot commodity (? קוברסי); Yehuda al-Ashqar(?); "your maternal uncle Yaʿaqov ben Hini" (someone of this name appears in BL OR 5561B.20 (PGPID 19239) in 1803 CE); "the Indian khwājā"; "to the Ḥijāz"; something for Saʿadya ha-Kohen; Nissim; and cloth (jūkh). Needs further examination.
